name: Unyielding Flapjack (Demo)
summary: You have been summoned to a fantasy world! Not to slay a demon lord or save a princess, but to cover a shift for a sick coworker at the three-star restaurant Pancakes and Pyre.  Unyielding Flapjack is a comedic fantasy VR cooking game where you serve magical pancakes under pressure of a questionably ethical boss.
